name: Minced Lamb Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients for the lamb balls.
Season and mix together.
2. With wetted hands, shape the mixture into 20-24 balls,
each about the size of a walnut. Place on a serving plate.
3. To make mushroom sauce:
a. Melt butter in a saucepan.
b. Add mushrooms and cook gently for 5 minutes.
c. Stir in flour, then gradually add milk, bringing to a boil.
d. Simmer for another 5 minutes, then season and add sherry.
4. Serve warm with lamb balls cooked in hot oil.
